assumptions.primary_objective: fill demand from available candidate edges; report shortage if candidate capacity is insufficient
assumptions.secondary_objective: prefer lower route score, where score includes route cost, route risk, grid dependency, and reroute penalty

method_limitations: Uses current candidate edge pool only; it does not search all possible factories/routes.
Edge capacity is a generated-flow proxy until vehicle/driver/route-throughput data is connected.
Factory output is public-data proxy capacity, not verified spare production capacity.
